parts.text: I am in Mumbai and water is rising. Are there any open shelters nearby with food and water?
My friend got bitten by a snake while we were evacuating. What first aid should I do? We have called for help.
I need to travel from Mumbai to Thane right now. Is the highway safe or is there flooding?
There is a cyclone warning for my area. What emergency supplies should I gather?
HELP! I am stranded on the roof at coordinates 19.076, 72.877 in Mumbai. Please broadcast an SOS to rescue services! My contact is 9876543210.
